cd 0.1.4

  • Changelog

Push files to S3

Source: R/cd_s3_push.R
cd_s3_push.Rd

Syncs a local directory to an S3 bucket using aws s3 sync. Only uploads new or changed files (--size-only). Requires the AWS CLI to be installed and configured.

Usage

cd_s3_push(local_dir, bucket = "stac-era5-land", prefix = "", dry_run = FALSE)

Arguments

local_dir

Character. Local directory to sync.

bucket

Character. S3 bucket name. Default "stac-era5-land".

prefix

Character. S3 key prefix (subdirectory in bucket). Default "" (bucket root).

dry_run

Logical. If TRUE, shows what would be uploaded without actually uploading. Default FALSE.

Value

The exit code from aws s3 sync (invisibly). Zero on success.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Preview what would be uploaded
cd_s3_push("data/cogs", dry_run = TRUE)

# Upload for real
cd_s3_push("data/cogs")

# Upload to a subdirectory in the bucket
cd_s3_push("data/cogs", prefix = "v1")
} # }
